Core Capabilities

What Powers the Studio

Capabilities forged through shipped games and running infrastructure.

🎮

Game Development

From pixel-perfect rendering to procedural worlds — battle-tested patterns from shipped games.

Canvas 2D Rendering Game Loop Architecture Input Systems Audio Integration Procedural Generation
⚙️

Studio Operations

The studio runs itself — Ralph watches, agents build, Pages deploy on every push.

Autonomous Monitoring Multi-Repo Governance Automated Deployments Project Board Management Blog Automation
🌐

Web & Tooling

Modern web stack for game showcases, studio pages, and developer tooling.

Astro Sites Tailwind CSS GitHub Pages GitHub Actions MCP Integrations

The Squad

The Team

One human founder and a squad of specialized AI agents. Click any card to learn more.

🏗️
Solo
Lead
▼

🏗️ Solo — Lead / Chief Architect

━━━
  • • Architecture decisions and code review
  • • Integration gates and quality standards
  • • Multi-repo governance design

Domains: Architecture, Governance, Integration

Status: ✅ Active

🔧

Tools
▼

🔧 Jango — Tool Engineer

━━━
  • • CI/CD pipelines and GitHub Actions
  • • Developer tooling and automation scripts
  • • MCP integrations and build systems

Domains: Tooling, CI/CD, Automation

Status: ✅ Active

Engine
▼

  • • Performance optimization
  • • Core engine systems and physics

Status: ✅ Active

Status: ✅ Active

Studio Journal

What's New

The story so far — every milestone in the studio's journey.

March 11

Studio Governance Approved

"9 domains, 4 approval tiers, 3 laws. The operating manual that lets 15 agents work autonomously while one founder keeps the wheel."

March 11

ComeRosquillas Goes Live

"Homer's Donut Quest is playable in your browser. Astro showcase site with donut-themed branding, deployed automatically on every push."

March 11

Project Board Enriched

"Priority, Game, Size, Agent, Sprint — 5 custom fields across 17 tracked issues. Three views: Sprint Board, Priority, Roadmap."

March 11

Studio Status Page Created

"You're looking at it. A living snapshot of the studio's capabilities, team, and progress."

March 11

Studio Restructure Ceremony

"Godot archived, web stack adopted. 16 tools deleted, 6 skills archived, 3 new web skills created. 4 agents hibernated, 11 active."

March 10

Ralph-Watch v2 Deployed

"Multi-repo autonomous monitoring with failure alerts. 401 lines of PowerShell watching 4 repos every 15 minutes."

March 9

ComeRosquillas Joins FFS

"Synced from OneDrive to GitHub, connected via squad upstream. 8 issues created, development pipeline established."

March 9

First Frame Studios Founded

"One founder, one idea: can AI agents ship real games? The answer starts here."

15 AI agents, Star Wars universe casting, structured autonomy. One human founder + specialized agents = a studio that ships.
